messages:
Gaddy: I'll send the documents by tomorrow
Gaddy: just need to finish the last page

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by tomorrow

messages: Gaddy: we probably need to do something about the project at some point

expected_commitments.context: we probably need to do something about the project at some point

policy_note: Vague action with no clear owner or deadline → unclear status, not ignored.

messages: Gaddy: who has time to prepare a full report by Friday?
policy_note: Rhetorical questions are not commitments, even if they mention an action.

messages: Gaddy: I already called the supplier yesterday and sorted it out
policy_note: Past-tense statements about completed actions without existing commitments → ignore.

messages:
Alice: Bob, can you send me the report by Friday?
Bob: sure, I'll have it ready by Friday

expected_commitments.context: sure, I'll have it ready by Friday

messages: Gaddy: Alice will send the documents, I'll make sure of it

expected_commitments.context: Alice will send the documents, I'll make sure of it

policy_note: Speaker asserts another person will do it → commitment with that person as party.

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by 17:00

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents when I can

messages:
Gaddy: I need to handle the paperwork
Gaddy: specifically the vendor registration forms
Gaddy: I'll do it by Wednesday

expected_commitments.context: I need to handle the paperwork, specifically the vendor registration forms

policy_note: Action details split across multiple messages → single commitment combining the information.
